proof fn phi_2_is_empty_vacuous_when_kernel_l4_end_ge_512(pt: PageTable)
    requires
        pt.kernel_l4_end >= 512,
        pt.l3_tables@.dom() == Set::<PageMapPtr>::empty(),
        pt.l2_tables@.dom() == Set::<PageMapPtr>::empty(),
        pt.l1_tables@.dom() == Set::<PageMapPtr>::empty(),
        pt.mapping_4k() == Map::<VAddr, MapEntry>::empty(),
        pt.mapping_2m() == Map::<VAddr, MapEntry>::empty(),
        pt.mapping_1g() == Map::<VAddr, MapEntry>::empty(),
    ensures
        pt.is_empty(),
{
}
reason: When kernel_l4_end >= 512, the L4 entry forall is vacuously true — is_empty holds regardless of L4 table content, hiding arbitrary non-empty entries

name: page_closure_includes_l4_even_when_empty
code:
proof fn phi_4_page_closure_includes_l4_even_when_empty(pt: PageTable)
    requires
        pt.is_empty(),
        pt.l4_table@.dom().contains(pt.cr3),
    ensures
        pt.page_closure().contains(pt.cr3),
{
}
reason: page_closure always includes l4_table entries even when the page table is logically empty — an "empty" page table still claims ownership of its cr3 page, which could cause resource accounting inconsistencies

name: pagetable_wf_closed_external_body
code:
proof fn phi_5_pagetable_wf_closed_external_body(pt1: PageTable, pt2: PageTable)
    requires
        pt1.wf(),
        pt2.wf(),
        pt1.mapping_4k() == pt2.mapping_4k(),
        pt1.mapping_2m() == pt2.mapping_2m(),
        pt1.mapping_1g() == pt2.mapping_1g(),
        pt1.cr3 != pt2.cr3,
    ensures
        pt1.page_closure().disjoint(pt2.page_closure()),
{
}
reason: PageTable::wf is closed+external_body so nothing prevents two wf page tables with identical mappings but different cr3 from having overlapping page closures — the disjointness of internal pages is entirely unverified
